sections: _Cohort: Users excluding tenant team | Trailing 4 weeks vs previous 4 weeks | Report relase: Mondays_

*Executive Summary*
• Activation improved this week with stronger creation behavior.
• Life Tab Viewed rose from 40.00% to 46.00% (+15.00%, 46/100).
• Task Created rose from 20.00% to 30.00% (+50.00%, 30/100).

*Top Movers*
• Signup Completed -> Task Created: 30.00% (30/100) vs 20.00% (20/100) (+50.00%). (<https://app.amplitude.com/analytics/tenant/chart/rviqohkp|chart>)
• Signup Completed -> Note Created: 12.00% (12/100) vs 8.00% (8/100) (+50.00%). (<https://app.amplitude.com/analytics/tenant/chart/p9fsuwzc|chart>)
• Signup Completed -> Life Tab Viewed: 46.00% (46/100) vs 40.00% (40/100) (+15.00%). (<https://app.amplitude.com/analytics/tenant/chart/oys29da5|chart>)

*Insights & Actions*
*Onboarding Friction*
• _Insight:_ Recent onboarding changes likely reduced early friction.
• _Action:_ Validate onboarding copy and event instrumentation for new users.
